metadata.scope: Beijing and Shanghai urban transit pet-carry restrictions
metadata.policy_summary: Default rule is prohibition of pets and animals on urban transit, with explicit exceptions for working guide dogs and working service animals where stated by city/mode rules.

decision_policy.hard_stop_semantics: If any applicable prohibition rule is triggered and no explicit exception applies, final decision is NOT_ALLOWED.

prohibited_categories: any animal that may affect transit safety or passenger order

sources.reference_note: Light rail follows metro passenger rules

metro.rule: No animals may be brought on board, including pets such as cats and dogs.
allowed_conditions: guide dog must be in working state
guide dog must be harnessed/leashed as required
must not affect other passengers or operation

light_rail.rule: No animals may be brought on board, including pets such as cats and dogs.
allowed_conditions: working guide dog exception only when recognized by staff rules
must not affect operation or passenger safety

bus.rule: Only guide dogs in working state may be carried. All other pets or animals are prohibited.
required_conditions_for_exception: guide dog must wear a guide harness

sources.reference_note: Tram follows the same prohibition rule as metro
Bus passenger rule emphasizing enclosed air-conditioned environment

metro.rule: It is prohibited to carry live poultry and animals such as cats and dogs, except guide dogs and military/police dogs.
allowed_conditions: must not affect transit operation or passenger safety

tram.rule: Tram follows the same restriction as metro: no live poultry or animals such as cats and dogs, except guide dogs and military/police dogs.
allowed_conditions: must not affect other passengers or safety

bus.rule: It is strictly prohibited to carry live poultry and cats/dogs or any animals, except guide dogs and military/police dogs if recognized by policy interpretation.
allowed_conditions: working state required for service animals
must be controlled and not disrupt the bus environment

evaluation_logic: If animal_type is in prohibited categories, deny by default.
If an explicit exception exists for the city/mode and all conditions are met, allow.
If the user input is ambiguous, ask a clarifying question rather than guessing.
Prefer the strictest applicable rule when city and mode rules differ.
